mapper.select: SELECT cp.category FROM post_reaction pr JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = pr.post_id WHERE pr.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY cp.category ORDER BY MAX(pr.created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT cp.*, u.name AS user_name FROM community_post cp JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.id WHERE cp.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post (user_id, category, title, content, company_name, job_title, interview_type, difficulty, status, tags_json, is_anonymous, nickname_profile_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{companyName}, #{jobTitle}, #{interviewType}, #{difficulty}, #{status}, #{tagsJson}, #{anonymous}, #{nicknameProfileId})
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, company_name = #{companyName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, interview_type = #{interviewType}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, is_anonymous = #{anonymous}, nickname_profile_id = #{nicknameProfileId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_interview_review (post_id, company_name, job_role, interview_type, difficulty, interview_date, result_status, questions_json) VALUES (#{postId}, #{companyName}, #{jobRole}, #{interviewType}, #{difficulty}, #{interviewDate}, #{resultStatus}, #{questionsJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE company_name = VALUES(company_name), job_role = VALUES(job_role), interview_type = VALUES(interview_type), difficulty = VALUES(difficulty), interview_date = VALUES(interview_date), result_status = VALUES(result_status), questions_json = VALUES(questions_json)
mapper.select:
SELECT cp.id FROM community_post cp WHERE cp.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_ai_result ar WHERE ar.post_id = cp.id AND ar.task_type = 'TAG' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' )
ORDER BY cp.id

SELECT cp.id FROM community_post cp WHERE cp.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_ai_result ar WHERE ar.post_id = cp.id AND ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' )
ORDER BY cp.id
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'HIDDEN'

SELECT cp.id FROM community_post cp WHERE cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND cp.category = 'INTERVIEW_REVIEW'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_ai_result ar WHERE ar.post_id = cp.id AND ar.task_type = 'INTERVIEW_EXTRACT' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' )
ORDER BY cp.id
SELECT cp.id, cp.title, cp.content FROM community_post cp WHERE cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_post_embedding e WHERE e.post_id = cp.id ) ORDER BY cp.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post_embedding (post_id, embedding) VALUES (#{postId}, #{embedding}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE embedding = VALUES(embedding)
